title: Track timelogs for the whole company

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Need to see where the hours have all gone?

Master Data’s got your back! Track timelogs for the whole company - whether it’s for a task, a ticket, or a project!

  • Sub-items as timelogs. Log billable and non-billable hours on numbers columns as sub-items.
  • Master Timesheets Board. Once logged, Master Data will sync all of the hours logged per item in each Source Board into a centralized Master Board.
  • Unlimited Source Boards. No matter how many boards you’re using in monday.com to track different company operations, you can link them to all to your Master Board!
  • Easy and comprehensive reporting. See how much time each person logged in for the last week, month, quarter, or year. Or check how much hours are logged per project.

Time flies when you’re… forgetting to track it. Coupled with monday.com’s endless possibilities for reporting, Master Data lets you see all essential information on company hours in one, single board.

Start your free 14 day trial here → Master Data - monday.com Marketplace

Book in for a demo here → https://calendar.app.google/UDTXPLDwYWq46pSH6
